description: woodland - the giant in the outdoor shoe industry, comes up with this rugged shoe with a refined stance. A cheeky take on the classic penny loafer, this two-hole lace up leather shoe references the conservative derby in its styling. Wear this with chinos or denims and a checked casual shirt or a tee. Style this with rugged belts.UpperLeather upper with aggressive stitch detailing and embossed branding on the lateral side of the heelStitches on the seams of the toe boxTwo-hole lace upPadded tonguePadded insole for in-step comfortRemovable sockliner to accommodate an orthoticMidsoleRubber midsole for cushioningOutsoleDual density TPU outsole with geometric lugs for grip and tractionUpraised heel and curved midfootOutsole reinforced onto the upper as a heel guardShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
